input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.5.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.5.1
            TITLE: any cooling or lubrication system must be sealed to prevent leakage

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.5.1: Any cooling or lubrication system must be sealed to prevent leakage
T.5.5.1 Any cooling or lubrication system must be sealed to prevent leakage
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 68 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: Any cooling or lubrication system must be sealed to prevent leakage
